title: Proclamation No. 1003, s. 2006
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1003

CREATING AND DESIGNATING THE TARLAC PROVINCIAL INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY PARK III SITUATED IN THE BARANGAY OF TIBAG (SAN ISIDRO), CITY OF TARLAC, PROVINCE OF TARLAC, ISLAND OF LUZON, AS INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY PARK PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916 AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No. 7916, the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995 as amended by Republic Act No. 8748 and upon recommendation of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority (PEZA), I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , President of the Republic of the Philippines, by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, do hereby create and designate as Information Technology Park , subject to the provisions of Republic Act No. 7916 as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, and Resolutions Nos. 00-411 and 05-467 dated 29 December 2000 and 22 December 2005 respectively, of the PEZA Board of Directors, the Tarlac Provincial Information Technology Park III located at Barangay Tibag (San Isidro), Tarlac City, Province of Tarlac, consisting an area of THIRTEEN THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED SIXTY EIGHT (13,968) SQUARE METERS, MORE OR LESS , as defined by the following technical descriptions:

LOT 5-B PSD-03-119417 TCT No. 359060

A parcel of land (Lot 5-B of the subdivision plan Psd-03-119417 being a portion of Lot 5 (LRC) Pcs-13170), situated in the Barangay of Tibag (San Isidro), City of Tarlac, Province of Tarlac.

Bounded on the NE., & SE., along lines 1-2-3 by Lot 5-E of the subdivision plan; on the SW., along lines 3-4-5 by Provincial Road; on the NW., along lines 5-6-7 by Road Lot; on the NE., along line 7-1 by Lot 5-C of the subdivision plan.

Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being S., 78 deg. 59′ W., 1322.41 m. from BLLM 14, Tarlac Cadastre. Thence,

beginning, containing an area of Thirteen Thousand Nine Hundred Sixty Eight (13,968) Square Meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by PS cyl. conc. mons. 15X40 cms. Bearings true; date of original survey June 1932-May 1937 and that of the subdivision survey dated November 30-December 01, 2001 and was approved on February 28, 2002.

IN WITNESS THEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed hereto.

Done in the City of Manila, this 16th day of February, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Six.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President: (Sgd.) EDUARDO R. ERMITA Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
